title: Payment
description: A Payment records a payment received from a customer. Payments can be applied to one or more outstanding invoices, or left as unapplied credit.

TxnDate.description: The date of the payment transaction

PaymentRefNum.description: Reference number for the payment (e.g., check number)

Line.description: Lines indicating which invoices or credit memos this payment is applied against

UnappliedAmt.description: Amount not yet applied to invoices

ProcessPayment.description: Whether to process the payment through the Intuit payment gateway
